name: cc-orchestrator
description: Codex-led planning with transparent, provider-neutral Claude Code delegation, task-chain sessions, audits, and mandatory verification.

interface.longDescription: Keep Codex for planning and verification while delegating bounded work to your configured Claude Code provider with visible receipts, session continuity, durable audits, and a required acceptance handoff.
defaultPrompt: Delegate a bounded implementation task to Claude Code
Continue a Claude task-chain and verify the result
Review my current changes with an independent Claude session
